capabilities.name: windows_native_tools
capabilities.description: 10 tools PowerShell-native: clipboard, process_list, system_info, disk_usage, env_list (con redact), network_info, registry_read (allowlist), task_scheduler_create, windows_notification.

capabilities.name: loop_detector_v3
capabilities.description: Loop detector con 3 capas: args hash, output fingerprint, y LLM-judge de progreso vs objetivo declarado.

capabilities.name: committee_voting
capabilities.description: Multi-model consensus con 7 roles dinámicos + pesos por historial + mediator heurístico.

capabilities.name: skill_registry_rollback
capabilities.description: Skill registry con SHA256 signing, audit pre-install multi-modelo, deps graph y rollback formal.

capabilities.name: audit_log_unified
capabilities.description: audit.jsonl unificado con tool_call + loop_abort + failover en un único stream grep-able.

capabilities.name: mission_replay
capabilities.description: dryRunReplay de audit.jsonl con detección de divergencias contra ejecución original.

capabilities.name: multi_user
capabilities.description: Scoped dirs y roles owner/collaborator/guest sobre el mismo runtime.
